title: Nether Coal Programmer Art
description: Changes the coal in the Nether Coal forward port mod by Tazzy101 to the original programmer art by the BTA Team
body:
Changes the coal in the Nether Coal forward port by Tazzy101 to the original programmer art by the BTA Team, this is primarily for use in my pack "Beta 21" as the ore texture in this port matches the JAPPA textures of current minecraft. You can play the pack if you want to [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/beta-21)

Also, not the place to mention it, but can someone make a mod to adjust the base walk speed? Seriously would help a lot in pretending to be the BTA mod haha.

Be gay, live your life no matter what
